mapper.select: SELECT id, source_urn as sourceUrn, target_urn as targetUrn, resource_id as resourceId, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, edge_prop FROM datafusion.asset_lineage_edge WHERE source_urn = #{sourceUrn} AND target_urn = #{targetUrn} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO datafusion.asset_lineage_edge (id, source_urn, target_urn, resource_id, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, edge_prop) VALUES
(#{edge.id}, #{edge.sourceUrn}, #{edge.targetUrn}, #{edge.resourceId}, #{edge.creator}, #{edge.updater}, #{edge.createTime}, #{edge.updateTime}, #{edge.edgeProp})
